---
title: "Portfolio"
---

## Worked analyses

This section will showcase worked analyses using publicly available fisheries data, demonstrating applied skills in data management, spatial analysis, and reproducible reporting in R.

*Coming soon.*

---

In the meantime, see my [Research](research.qmd) page for peer-reviewed research output, or download my [capability statement](assets/jade_maggs_capability_statement.pdf) for a summary of technical skills and consulting availability.
